name: SearchPulse Session API
short_description: Accepts client-side search session signals from the Service Portal and stores them in u_sp_search_session.

resources.name: Start Session
resources.short_description: Creates a new search session record and returns a session_id.

resources.name: Record Signal
resources.short_description: Records a single user signal event against an existing session.

resources.name: End Session
resources.short_description: Finalizes the session and triggers outcome classification.
